Fields.Name: AI Volume Rate
Fields.Description: Normal when 1x. When set to 0, the radius of sound becomes 0 (SE and SFX are unrelated game-like parameters).

Fields.Name: On Hit [1] - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: When the character steps on the hit material, the set special effect 0 is exhibited.

Fields.Name: On Hit [2] - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: When the character steps on the hit material, the set special effect 1 is exhibited.

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Height Type
Fields.Description: Height to generate foot effect

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Direction Type
Fields.Description: Direction of foot effect

Fields.Name: Floor Height Type
Fields.Description: For floating items such as the surface of the water

Fields.Name: Disable Fall Damage
Fields.Description: Set to 1 for floors that are not subject to fall damage

Fields.Name: Is Hardness for Sound Reverb
Fields.Description: Is it a hard material for sound echo? (0: soft, 1: hard)

Fields.Name: Hardness Type
Fields.Description: The hardness of the material. Used for soft contact processing of rigid bodies.

Fields.Name: On Hit [0] - NG+1 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 0 2nd lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [0] - NG+2 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 0 3rd lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [0] - NG+3 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 0 4th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [0] - NG+4 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 0 5th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [0] - NG+5 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 0 6th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [0] - NG+6 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 0 7th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [0] - NG+7 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 0 8th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [1] - NG+1 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 1st lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [1] - NG+2 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 1 3rd lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [1] - NG+3 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 1 4th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [1] - NG+4 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 1 5th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [1] - NG+5 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect when stepping on the hit material 1 6th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [1] - NG+6 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 1 7th lap

Fields.Name: On Hit [1] - NG+7 - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when stepping on the hit material 1 8th lap

Fields.Name: Rain - Replace Material ID
Fields.Description: Hit material change destination ID due to weather (rain) (-1: No change)

Fields.Name: Wetness [0] - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect for wetting 00

Fields.Name: Wetness [1] - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effects for wetting 01

Fields.Description: Special effects for wetting 02

Fields.Description: Special effects for wetting 03
